title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 446.100 - Evidence of notice
text:
446.100.  Evidence of notice. — Satisfactory evidence of such notice shall be required by the judge before he proceeds to take such depositions, which shall appear in his certificate annexed to the depositions.
(RSMo 1939 § 1980, A. 1949 S.B. 1126, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1816; 1919 § 5503; 1909 § 6446 
Effective 1-02-79
